definition: A statistical variable that is composed of up to seven facet dimensions drawn from sevocab concept schemes, representing a measurable energy-domain quantity.
A DCAT dataset that contains one or more energy variables and is published by an energy agent.
A FOAF agent that publishes one or more energy datasets.
The data structure definition that declares the seven facet dimensions composing an energy variable.
A dimension property whose code list is MeasuredPropertyScheme, representing the physical or economic quantity being measured.
A dimension property whose code list is DomainObjectScheme, representing the entity or system the measurement is about.
A dimension property whose code list is TechnologyOrFuelScheme, representing the energy technology or fuel type.
A dimension property whose code list is StatisticTypeScheme, representing the kind of statistical measure (stock, flow, price, etc.).
A dimension property whose code list is AggregationScheme, representing the temporal aggregation method.
A dimension property whose code list is UnitFamilyScheme, representing the family of measurement units.
A dimension property whose code list is PolicyInstrumentScheme, representing the policy mechanism involved.
An object property that links an energy dataset to its constituent energy variables.
